OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Creates or updates party expense records based on the assessment question responses in an individual application for benefits.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreatePartyExpenses

omniProcessElements.name: AppendChildCareAmount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "MapObject" : "=%SetChildCareAmount:ChildCareAmount%", "PayloadString" : "=%PayloadString%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "disableChainable" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%SetChildCareAmount:ChildCareAmount% != NULL", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "integrationProcedureKey" : "BenefitManagement_CreateSerializedRecordList", "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "PayloadString", "responseJSONPath" : "ResString", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
